subcodes.title: Seal of Baha’u’llah #11
subcodes.first_line: My inner and outer beings call to each other, saying:  There is no king but me, the truth, the knower of things unseen.
subcodes.first_line_orig: یدعو ظاهری باطنی و باطنی ظاهری لیس فی الملک سوائی و انا الحق علام الغیوب
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @transcendence; unknowability of God
